title: mlnplus' Essentials
description: This is a modpack entirely made by me with little inspiration taken from some famous modpacks.
body:
# mlnplus' Essentials

mlnplus' Essentials is a modpack with lots of useful and optimization mods!

**How does this modpack differ from regular minecraft?**
- It adds many performance enhancing mods to provide the user a smoother experience.
- It adds many quality of life mods such as AppleSkin, BetterF3 and much more.
- Includes mods to help you in combat situations such as BetterShields, BetterHurtCam, TierTagger, etc.

**If you have any suggestions or ideas feel free to contact me on discord [here](https://discord.com/users/578581299070238721)!**
